recipe.title: Chicken Enchiladas

ingredients.name: sea salt and freshly-cracked black pepper
large flour tortillas
ingredients.note: default tortilla from the source recipe

ingredients.name: red enchilada sauce
ingredients.note: source recommends homemade tomato-free red sauce

ingredients.name: oil for enchilada sauce
ingredients.note: from linked homemade red enchilada sauce

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.note: roux thickener for homemade red enchilada sauce

ingredients.name: American-style chili powder
ingredients.note: primary seasoning for homemade red enchilada sauce; not pure cayenne

ingredients.name: fine sea salt
ingredients.note: homemade red enchilada sauce, to taste

steps.text: Preheat the oven to 350 F and prepare the homemade red enchilada sauce.
steps.timing: 5 minutes prep plus 10-15 minutes simmer for sauce
steps.visualCue: deep brick-red sauce bubbling lightly and coating a spoon
steps.textureCue: glossy medium-thick sauce with soft whisk ripples
steps.runwayRisk: dark sauce can read as tomato sauce unless prompted as chili-spice roux sauce

steps.text: Heat oil in a large saute pan over medium-high heat.
steps.visualCue: thin shimmer of oil across the pan surface
steps.textureCue: clear oil sheen with first wisps of steam
steps.runwayRisk: avoid visible flame on induction references

steps.text: Add diced onion and saute for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
steps.visualCue: onion cubes turning translucent at the edges
steps.textureCue: wet snap softening into glossy sauteed onion
steps.runwayRisk: tiny onion pieces may drift; keep motion simple and pan-centered

steps.text: Add diced chicken and green chiles, season with salt and pepper, and saute until the chicken is cooked through.
steps.visualCue: small chicken cubes changing from pink to opaque white with green chile flecks
steps.textureCue: juicy chicken edges, steam, chile-speckled moisture
steps.runwayRisk: raw-to-cooked chicken transformation should use hard cuts rather than continuous morphing

steps.text: Add black beans and stir until evenly combined, then remove the filling from heat.
steps.visualCue: black beans folding through chicken, onion, and green chiles
steps.textureCue: matte beans against moist chicken and glossy pan juices
steps.runwayRisk: beans can look like olives if too large; describe black beans clearly

steps.text: Set up tortillas, enchilada sauce, chicken mixture, and cheese for assembly.
steps.visualCue: overhead assembly line on the kitchen island
steps.textureCue: soft flour tortilla, red sauce, chunky filling, shredded cheese
steps.runwayRisk: avoid neutral ingredient lineup as a hero beat; use only as a quick context bridge

steps.text: Spread two tablespoons of sauce over each tortilla.
steps.visualCue: red sauce smeared into a glossy oval across a soft tortilla
steps.textureCue: sauce gliding thinly, leaving spoon trails
steps.runwayRisk: spoon can float without visible hands; require visible Licorn hands

steps.text: Add a generous spoonful of chicken mixture in a line down the center of the tortilla.
steps.visualCue: chunky filling arranged as a straight mound
steps.textureCue: steam, black beans, chicken cubes, onion and chile specks
steps.runwayRisk: filling geometry can scatter; keep it as one centered line

steps.visualCue: shredded cheese falling over hot chicken filling
steps.textureCue: fine pale shreds landing on moist filling
steps.runwayRisk: falling shreds can become confetti; keep camera close and hand visible

steps.text: Roll each tortilla and place seam-side down in a greased 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
steps.visualCue: soft tortilla rolling into a tight cylinder and joining neat rows
steps.textureCue: pliable tortilla folds, tucked seam, snug parallel rows
steps.runwayRisk: rolling motion can tangle hands; isolate one roll per shot

steps.text: Spread the remaining sauce over the enchiladas and top with extra cheese.
steps.visualCue: red sauce blanket and shredded cheese covering the rowed tortillas
steps.textureCue: thick sauce pooling between ridges, snowy shredded cheese layer
steps.runwayRisk: pan topology needs a state reference so rolls do not merge into lasagna

steps.text: Bake uncovered for 20 minutes until hot, melty, and slightly crispy outside.
steps.visualCue: bubbling cheese, red sauce at the edges, crisp tortilla ridges
steps.textureCue: molten cheese stretch, blistered bubbles, crisp browned tortilla tips
steps.runwayRisk: bake transformation should use hard cuts between unbaked and baked state references

steps.visualCue: cilantro, avocado, sour cream, red onion, and cotija over steaming enchiladas
steps.textureCue: cool creamy sour cream against hot glossy sauce and melted cheese
steps.runwayRisk: small toppings can drift; add them one topping family per shot

assumptions: Use the source recipe default of large flour tortillas, not the optional corn tortilla variation.
Use the linked homemade red enchilada sauce as the visual and flavor anchor because the source describes it as the magic of the recipe.
Use black beans as the default bean because the recipe lists black beans in the ingredient card.
Include cilantro, avocado, red onion, sour cream, and cotija as optional toppings for color and texture contrast.
Target a 60-second vertical ASMR food video with Seedance 2 References mode and no generated media launched from this workspace.
criticalTransformations: Oil and flour roux blooms with chili powder and spices, then stock turns it into a smooth brick-red sauce that coats a spoon.
Diced chicken cooks with onion and green chiles until opaque before black beans are folded through the steaming filling.
Filled tortillas roll into eight distinct seam-side-down cylinders with rounded ridges in a rectangular baking dish.
Sauced and cheesed rolls bake until the filling is hot, cheese bubbles and blisters, sauce simmers at the edges, and tortilla tips crisp.
visualTextureOpportunities: Glossy brick-red enchilada sauce ribbon dragged across a soft flour tortilla.
Chili powder blooming in a roux before stock loosens it into sauce.
Onions sizzling and turning translucent in a shallow oil sheen.
Steam from chicken, green chiles, and black beans folding together.
Shredded cheese falling onto hot filling and later melting into stretchy strands.
Neat tortilla cylinders tucked seam-side down into a baking dish.
Sauce blanket pooling between enchilada ridges before baking.
Bubbling cheese and crisp tortilla edges after oven reveal.
Cool toppings hitting hot enchiladas: avocado cubes, sour cream ribbons, cilantro, red onion, cotija.
Final spatula lift with cheese stretch and steam.
possibleHooks: A glossy red enchilada sauce ribbon sweeps across a tortilla in the first second, then hard-cuts back to the sauce bubbling in the pan.
Bubbling baked cheese and crisp red-sauced edges appear as a payoff beat, then the edit jumps back to assembly.
A hot enchilada lifts from the pan with cheese strands stretching, reserved for the ending rather than the opening.
